title: webpage: Dead link to 1.32 Release Announcement
body:
https://buildah.io contains
```
What’s New!

03 Oct 2023 » [Buildah v1.32.0 Release Announcement](https://buildah.io/new/2023/10/03/new.html)

Buildah v1.32.0 is here with lots of improvements and enhancements. Check out the [Release Announcement](https://buildah.io/releases/2023/10/02/Buildah-version-v1.32.0.html).
```
The second hyperlink destination - https://buildah.io/releases/2023/10/02/Buildah-version-v1.32.0.html - does not exits.

The first hyperlink - https://buildah.io/new/2023/10/03/new.html - does exist, but it just contains a hyperlink to https://buildah.io/releases/2023/10/02/Buildah-version-v1.32.0.html , which on its own does not exist.

comments.body: Interested in opening a PR to fix?
No.  I also do not know where the release notes are.

I think they are in the buildah.io repo.
@TomSweeneyRedHat PTAL
They are in the Buildah.io repo, I'll take a look.
Fixed with https://github.com/containers/buildah.io/pull/112.  Thanks for the issue report @dilyanpalauzov !
